---
title: "Caption Test"
format:
  pdf:
    keep-tex: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

See @tbl-mytable for details.

```{python}
#| label: tbl-mytable
#| tbl-cap: "My raw latex table"

from IPython.display import Latex

latex = r"""
\begin{tabular}{lr}
\hline
A & B \\
\hline
1 & 2 \\
\hline
3 & 4 \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
"""
Latex(latex)
```
